data.name: MEDUSA
data.detailed_description: 化身迷人的梅杜莎，操控蛇身在鏡頭下穿梭，每一次移動，逐步揭開隱藏的神秘畫作。《Medusa》將經典貪吃蛇玩法結合動態解謎，帶來技巧與耐心並存的挑戰。 在光影交織中前進，避開障礙與自我纏繞，慢慢揭露出充滿誘惑與藝術氣息的畫面。 一場關於凝視與欲望的微妙冒險，正等你踏上。
data.about_the_game: 化身迷人的梅杜莎，操控蛇身在鏡頭下穿梭，每一次移動，逐步揭開隱藏的神秘畫作。《Medusa》將經典貪吃蛇玩法結合動態解謎，帶來技巧與耐心並存的挑戰。 在光影交織中前進，避開障礙與自我纏繞，慢慢揭露出充滿誘惑與藝術氣息的畫面。 一場關於凝視與欲望的微妙冒險，正等你踏上。
data.short_description: 在光影交錯的鏡頭之下，一場靜謐而曖昧的探索正悄然展開。 《Medusa》重新詮釋經典貪吃蛇玩法，玩家將操控梅杜莎的蛇身，在如相機鏡頭般的畫面中穿梭，逐步揭開隱藏其後的精緻畫作。每一次流暢的移動，不僅是技巧的試煉，更是一步步接近真相的旅程。 隨著蛇身延伸，畫面背後的秘密也隨之浮現——那是一場光與色交織的悸動邀請。小心規劃路徑，避免自我纏繞與障礙阻擋，在緊張與期待交融之中，體驗一場關於凝視、誘惑與掌控的冒險。 能否駕馭慾望與技巧，完整揭開這片曖昧而誘人的畫布？ 現在，梅杜莎正等待你的凝視。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西

  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體

建議配備:

  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon HD 6870

data.name: MEDUSA
data.detailed_description: Take on the role of the alluring Medusa, gliding across the lens to reveal hidden masterpieces with every move. Medusa blends classic snake gameplay with dynamic puzzle elements, offering a challenge of precision and patience. Navigate through shifting light and shadows, avoid collisions, and uncover art pieces filled with beauty and temptation. An intimate journey of gaze and desire awaits your command.
data.about_the_game: Take on the role of the alluring Medusa, gliding across the lens to reveal hidden masterpieces with every move. Medusa blends classic snake gameplay with dynamic puzzle elements, offering a challenge of precision and patience. Navigate through shifting light and shadows, avoid collisions, and uncover art pieces filled with beauty and temptation. An intimate journey of gaze and desire awaits your command.
data.short_description: Under shifting light and shadow, a silent and tempting journey begins. In Medusa, guide the serpent form of the legendary figure across a lens-like field, slowly revealing the hidden masterpiece beneath. Every move tests your precision, patience, and will to resist temptation.
data.supported_languages: English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil
